questions.question: What is the main difference between the Empathize and Define stages in Design Thinking?
expectedPoints: Empathize focuses on gathering user insights through research and observation
Define focuses on synthesizing those insights into a clear problem statement
Empathize is about understanding, Define is about framing the problem

questions.question: Explain how Design Thinking supports iterative design and why iteration is valuable in UX design.
expectedPoints: Design Thinking is non-linear and encourages moving between stages
Testing phase often leads back to redefinition or new ideas
Iteration allows for continuous improvement based on user feedback
Reduces risk of building the wrong solution
Fosters innovation through multiple cycles of refinement
Creates more user-centered solutions through repeated validation
